body.title: Review all 169 env vars — slim the list, merge duplicates, remove dead ones
body.result: Phase 1: unified boredom threshold duplicate (0.05→0.08), removed dead IGOR_CALL_COST_WARN_USD. Principle established: minimum env vars. Full knob→config.py migration follow-up.
body.description: 169 env vars in the codebase. Many are duplicates (IGOR_BOREDOM_AROUSAL_THRESH vs IGOR_BOREDOM_AROUSAL_THRESHOLD), dead (features removed), or could share a single tuning knob. Akien + CC review session to: (1) identify dead vars, (2) merge duplicates, (3) decide which are secrets vs switches vs tuning vs defaults-only. Prerequisite for T-config-arch-finish.
